attributes.action: Prohibit all animal testing and cruelty completely in the UK.
attributes.additional_details: Over 3 million animals are used annually for medical and scientific research and brands that use animal testing are still being sold in UK stores. We believe any form of animal testing is cruel and disgusting as it is unfair to the innocent animals being used and there are also alternative methods that could be used, making the procedures completely unnecessary and cruel. As an animal owner and lover I know something needs to be done in order to put a stop to this injustice at once.
attributes.background: We want to make sure no brands brought or sold in the UK are incorporate taking any advantages of animals or using them for scientific, cosmetic or unnecessary medical testing.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

End testing on dogs and other animals for development of products for human use
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/736578
